{{Quote|Rest peacefully.|[[Jaden Korr]] closing the Barsen'thor's tomb on Chandrila|<ref name="Academy" />}}
The '''Mission to Chandrila''' was carried out by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaden Korr]] in [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]] during the [[Disciples of Ragnos crisis]]. The [[Disciples of Ragnos]], a [[Sith cult/Legends|Sith cult]], attempted to siphon Force energy from the [[Chandrila Jedi tomb|tomb]] of the [[The Barsen'thor|third Barsen'thor]] of the Jedi Order on [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]].

==History==
===Cultist takeover===
Upon discovery of the [[Chandrila Jedi tomb|tomb]] of the [[The Barsen'thor|Barsen'thor]]<ref name="Force and Destiny Rulebook">[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]]</ref> and its tremendous aura of [[The Force/Legends|Force]] residue, [[Tavion Axmis]], the cult's leader, sent her [[Sith cultist/Legends|Cultists]], assisted by [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]], to infiltrate the tomb and secure it for her arrival. The Cultists stormed the sanctuary and breached the Jedi's coffin, unsealing it to make ready for their leader. Finally, they holed themselves up in the vast underground catacomb and secured key locations throughout, waiting for Axmis to arrive so that they could begin extracting Force energy.

===Jaden Korr's intervention===
Jaden Korr arrived at the tomb after receiving intelligence of the cult's activities and proceeded to investigate. Finding his route into the tomb blocked by large boulders, he used the Force to clear them aside, killing a mercenary standing on the balcony in front of the entrance in the process. Korr moved on through the tomb, engaging mercenaries and cultists and killing them. Attempts to demolish bridges in the tomb in order to deter Korr were made, although he managed to bypass these difficulties, defeating further cult members as he continued towards the burial chamber. Upon reaching the chamber, Korr encountered a [[Unidentified New Reborn|New Reborn]] wielding a [[Double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|saberstaff]]. The two dueled, and Korr emerged victorious. He resealed the casket, allowing the dead Jedi to once again rest in peace. But in doing so, the burial chamber began to collapse. Korr escaped from the sanctuary, while those cultists who remained were killed in the ensuing destruction of the dead Jedi's mausoleum.

==Behind the scenes==
The Mission to Chandrila was one of the two missions included in the demo of ''Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy'', the other mission being [[Mission to Mos Eisley (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|Mission to Mos Eisley]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' {{1st}}
